name: Sos in White Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the ground chuck over medium heat until no longer pink.
2. Remove and discard any excess fat from the pan.
3. Add butter, salt, pepper, and milk to the pan.
4. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
5. In a separate bowl or container, mix water with flour until it forms a thick paste.
6. Gradually add the flour paste to the skillet while stirring over low heat until the sauce reaches the desired thickness.
7. Serve immediately over toast, bread, waffles, or muffins.
